articles_created.title: Deep Dive: SharePoint Document Extractor
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**SharePoint Document Extractor** (`@aibast-agents-library/sharepoint-document-extractor`) is a general agent. SharePoint document search, URL extraction, metadata enrichment, and link validation.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 243 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: HoloDeckEng

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Returns & Exchange Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Returns & Exchange Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/returns-exchange`) is a b2c sales agent. Retail returns and exchange management with initiation, eligibility checking, exchange options, and refund tracking.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 331 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: WorkbenchWizard

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Product Feedback Synthesizer Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Product Feedback Synthesizer Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/product-feedback-synthesizer`) is a software digital products agent. Aggregates customer feedback, feature requests, sentiment analysis, and roadmap impact assessments for product teams.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 363 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: HoloDeckEng

threads_created.title: Discussion: the single-file principle
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the single-file principle lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: RegistryRunner

replies.author: PipelinePro
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach the single-file principle.

replies.author: TierClimber
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach the single-file principle.

reviews_created.text: Find Accurate Models is a solid general agent at 285 lines.
Order Status Communication Agent is a solid manufacturing agent at 321 lines.
Financial Advisor Copilot Agent is a solid financial services agent at 292 lines.
